Research Basis: TikTok Interest Graph benchmarks; foraging niche engagement 5–8% for micro-accounts; comparable niche Etsy sellers report $6–12 organic CAC via TikTok
Notes: Primary channel. No paid in Week 1–2. Organic-first — TikTok reaches 5K–20K niche viewers per post at zero followers. CAC reflects labor cost not cash spend.

Research Basis: TikTok Promote CPC $0.03–0.10/view; at 2.24% conversion rate and $14 AOV, CAC = ~$14–22
Notes: Activate Week 3+ only. Boost best-performing organic video (3%+ completion rate). Do not create new paid creative.

Research Basis: Instagram Reels 30.81% reach rate; niche lifestyle CTR 1.5–3% per eRank; organic CAC higher than TikTok due to lower algorithmic reach at zero followers
Notes: Cross-post TikTok content — no extra production cost. Secondary to TikTok.

Research Basis: Pinterest organic pins for niche digital products: 0.5–1.5% save rate; 30–180 day lifespan; low initial velocity but compounds
Notes: Tertiary. Pin seasonal foraging content. Activate paid only in Phase 3.

Research Basis: YouTube Shorts: 1K–3K views per Short in first 30 days for new channels; dual discovery (YouTube + Google) adds compound value
Notes: Experimental in Phase 2. Keyword-first titles. Search-indexed content compounds over 90+ days.

Research Basis: Prepper cohort skews YouTube-primary (35–60 demographic); keyword-optimized Shorts appear in Google search; dual discovery mechanism
Notes: Primary channel. Treat as SEO content not social. Post 1 Short/week. Do not run paid Shorts.

Research Basis: Instagram engagement 2–5% for micro-accounts in survival/prepper niche per IZEA benchmarks; comparable accounts: @buckskin_revolution 40K, @danwowak 30K
Notes: Secondary. Static posts preferred over Reels for this cohort — less algorithm-dependent.

Research Basis: Meta Ads Instagram: CPC $0.50–$1.20; at 2.24% conversion rate and $25 AOV, CAC = ~$22–54; optimistic end with strong creative and review social proof
Notes: Activate only after 10+ Etsy reviews. Social proof reduces CPA by 30–40%. Target: Emergency Preparedness + Self-Sufficiency interests.

Research Basis: TikTok reach for survival content is strong but prepper cohort trusts YouTube over TikTok; engagement exists but conversion to purchase is lower
Notes: Tertiary. Cross-post YouTube Shorts as TikToks. No paid TikTok for this cohort.

Research Basis: Reddit r/preppers 200K+ members; well-placed answers drive 50–200 Etsy visits; zero cash CAC but labor-intensive
Notes: CAC reflects time cost only. High credibility if done authentically. No broadcast — answer questions only.

Research Basis: Instagram Reels 30.81% reach rate confirmed 2026; homesteading niche 2.5–4% CTR from Reels per eRank data; highest LTV efficiency ratio (1:9–1:14) of all cohorts
Notes: Primary channel. Process/transformation content. Weekly seasonal anchor. Best organic ROI of all cohorts.

Research Basis: Meta Ads e-commerce CPA: $7–10 for lifestyle/home goods (industry benchmark); homesteading niche lifestyle CAC slightly higher at $12–20 due to niche targeting
Notes: Start Day 7. Carousel ad with guide page previews. Target: Homesteading + Permaculture + Organic Gardening. Budget: $10/day.

Research Basis: Pinterest home goods 2% CVR, $7–10 CPA (AdBacklog 2025); homesteaders use Pinterest as project-planning platform — high purchase intent
Notes: Strong secondary. 2:3 vertical images. Boards: 'Seed Saving Guides' 'Zone Planting Charts'. Pins compound over 30–90 days.

Research Basis: Pinterest CPM $2–5 for lifestyle/home goods niche; CPC $0.10–$0.80; retail CPA $7–8 per AdBacklog 2025 benchmarks
Notes: Budget: $5/day. Lowest cost-per-impression of any paid platform. Start Day 5 for Gift Buyer; Day 7 for Homesteader seed saving board.

Research Basis: TikTok homesteading content performs well but Instagram Reels delivers better LTV for this cohort per comparable seller data
Notes: Secondary. Cross-post Instagram Reels. Hashtags: #homesteadlife #growyourown #permaculture. No paid TikTok for this cohort.

Research Basis: Homesteader cohort (35–65) remains active in Facebook groups; no paid Facebook for this cohort — budget better spent on Instagram
Notes: Supplementary only. Organic community engagement. 3–4 helpful posts per week before sharing any product link.

Research Basis: Pinterest gift discovery search: 2–4% CVR for gift/lifestyle products; pins live 30–180 days; gift buyers use Pinterest as primary discovery tool
Notes: Primary channel. Two concentration windows: Mother's Day (May 1–10) and holiday (Nov 20–Dec 20). Vertical 1000×1500px pins.

Research Basis: Pinterest retail CPA $7–8 (AdBacklog 2025); lifestyle/gift products $8–12 CPA; CPM $2–5 is cheapest paid reach of any platform
Notes: Budget: $5/day. Activate May 25 (5 days pre-launch — pins need indexing time). Rich Pins for auto-price display.

Research Basis: Instagram Story CTR 1–2% for niche lifestyle content; gift discovery is secondary on Instagram vs. Pinterest
Notes: Activate during Mother's Day window and holiday season only. Off-season: organic Reels with gift-framing aesthetic.

Research Basis: Instagram Story Ads CPC $0.50–$1.20; gift buyers convert faster on discovery (Pinterest) than Instagram — Instagram works for seasonal urgency
Notes: $10/day for Mother's Day window (May 1–10) and holiday window (Nov 20–Dec 20) only. Do not run year-round.

Research Basis: Gift buyers do not typically discover gifts on TikTok; low purchase intent for gift discovery on this platform per social commerce research
Notes: Not recommended as primary. Post lifestyle content organically only. No paid TikTok for Gift Buyer cohort.

Research Basis: Facebook gift discovery active for 40–55 demographic; lower ROAS than Pinterest for this niche in 2026
Notes: Consider $10/day Facebook carousel ad for 10 days in November holiday window only. Not a Phase 2 priority.
